meaning: n.克莱门氏小柑橘(为柑橘与酸柑杂交的品种)
examples: Data collected in 1994 by the Clementine spacecraft show that many of these lunar basins have no anomalously low gravity and some even have anomalously high gravity.
This image is from the mid-90s, from the American spacecraft called Clementine.
Unlike earlier lunar missions, Clementine didn't orbit only around the moon's equator.
"I love giving and Comic Relief is the perfect opportunity to do so, " said Clementine.
Clementine's radio beam was bounced off the moon to a receiving dish on earth.
